body: Proof-only outcome for the task_update / approval_required enrichment audit: no new shared helper is needed beyond RuntimeEvent::project() and RuntimeEvent::primary_entity_ref(). The domain already exposes the identities the API/store composition path needs, so the remaining work stays on the surface/runtime shaping side rather than in cairn-domain. Proof commands: cargo test -p cairn-domain --lib task_and_approval_events_already_carry_identity_for_enrichment --quiet; cargo test -p cairn-api --test sse_payload_alignment --quiet. Updated .coordination/mailbox/worker-2.md with the proof note.
